diagnosis_smoke.name: code.frontend.svelte diagnosis smoke
signals: array/object mutated in place so the compiler never re-renders
manual store.subscribe without unsubscribe causing a leak
browser-only API called during SSR in a universal load
state read in $effect that re-triggers itself in a loop
secret read in a universal load and leaked to the client
